name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
notes:
This Building Block detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth, Max Altgelt, Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or mshta.exe or wscript.exe or cscript.exe]

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\temp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\temporary internet%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\temp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%temp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%tmp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%localappdata%\temp%' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% >%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%out-file%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%convertto-json%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-windowstyle hidden -verb runas%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\system32\config\systemprofile\appdata\local\temp\amazon\ec2-windows\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or mshta.exe or wscript.exe or cscript.exe]

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\temp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\temporary internet%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\temp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%temp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%tmp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%localappdata%\temp%' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% >%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%out-file%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%convertto-json%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-windowstyle hidden -verb runas%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\system32\config\systemprofile\appdata\local\temp\amazon\ec2-windows\%' AQL filter query
